title: Command output is retained and re-rendered without bounds
reasoning: Every stream chunk and command result is appended to commandLog for the lifetime of the renderer session, and CommandPanel rebuilds the full output string on every render. A verbose review/fix/status command or several long sessions can grow memory usage and make unrelated UI updates increasingly expensive.
recommendation: Cap retained command log entries or bytes, add a clear-output action, and render output incrementally or memoize the formatted text so normal UI renders do not repeatedly format the entire history.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests exercise large command streams or repeated command output rendering.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a renderer test that sends many stream events and asserts the log is capped or trimmed according to the chosen retention policy.
minimumFixScope: Introduce a bounded command log policy in ClawpatchApp and avoid recomputing the full formatted output on every CommandPanel render.
